reasoning: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.

concerns.analysis: A very large portion of the document is missing from the output. Specifically, pages 18 through 33, which comprise a 16-page marketing brochure for the RQI T-CPR Program ('Saving Lives Together'), are entirely absent. This brochure contains critical information such as the value proposition, detailed curriculum overviews, cost comparisons, and case studies. The output itself explicitly notes this failure in a placeholder section at the end.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: PDF Pages 18-33 contain a 16-page brochure titled 'Saving Lives Together' including sections: 'RQI Telecommunicator CPR Value Proposition', 'Essentials Program', 'Curriculum Overview Comparison', 'Cardiac Arrest Case Review', and more.
concerns.output_quote: Content from pages 18-34 could not be converted. This section may be available after retry.

concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: On page 37 of the source PDF, there is a section titled 'Proposed - 2023 Education Committee Goals - Proposed' which contains four distinct goal items. In the JSON output, this section header exists, but the 'elements' array is empty, resulting in the omission of 100% of the text content for that specific section.
concerns.source_pdf_quote:
Proposed - 2023 Education Committee Goals - Proposed
1. Continue the information-sharing program...
2. Continue to develop a voluntary Telecommunicator training certificate...
3. Expand the Recruitment Public Service Announcement initiative...
4. Explore additional methods for public outreach...
concerns.location: Proposed - 2023 Education Committee Goals - Proposed, page 37, element index 9

concerns.analysis: A significant hierarchy error occurs on page 37. The heading 'Proposed - 2023 Education Committee Goals - Proposed' is rendered as an empty section (Section 9). The content that should be nested under this heading (the 2023 goal list) was incorrectly merged into the list belonging to the previous heading (Section 8). This creates an orphaned heading and a break in the document's logical structure.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Page 37: 'Proposed - 2023 Education Committee Goals - Proposed' heading followed by its specific list of 4 goals.
concerns.output_quote: Section 9: 'Proposed - 2023 Education Committee Goals - Proposed' contains 'elements': []. Section 8 contains a merged list of 8 items.

concerns.analysis: There is a massive failure in the reading order and content preservation. Pages 18 through 34 of the source PDF are entirely missing from the conversion, with a placeholder inserted at the end of the document (Section 11). This gap includes the entirety of the brochure (pp. 18-33) and the title/introductory content for the D-RAK course (p. 34). Consequently, the D-RAK section (Section 5) starts abruptly mid-page with a list, missing its context.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: PDF Page 34: 'Dispatch Response to Active Killers (D-RAK) 2-Day Scenario-Based Training Course' followed by three paragraphs of introductory text.
concerns.output_quote: Section 11: '[Pages 18-34 unavailable]' and Section 5 starts immediately with 'Dispatchers will:'.

concerns.analysis: There are several list errors. On page 37, two distinct numbered lists are merged into a single 8-item list in Section 8. On page 8, the Table of Contents list is rendered as a single paragraph block with newline characters rather than semantic list items.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Page 37: Two separate lists (1-4 for 2022, 1-4 for 2023).

concerns.analysis: Several URLs and email addresses clearly visible in the PDF are present in the text but are not marked as clickable links (missing 'href' property in the JSON structure). Examples include the AHA guidelines URL on page 9 and the RQI resource URL on page 17.
concerns.output_quote: The text contains the strings but they are part of a plain paragraph/content block without URI tagging.
concerns.location: Section 4 (elements corresponding to p9 and p17)

action_items: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.
